stemHtml: When climbing out at a low altitude in an aircraft fitted with an Split Bus Bar System, the Voltage reading from GEN 1 (IDG) suddenly spikes up to 1000 V which engages a caution annunciator. What is the pilot’s immediate action?

options.a: Disconnect the generator by deactivating the Exciter Control Relay Field and switching to Emergency Power by turning on the APU.
options.b: Nothing, the system is protected by circuit breakers and a GCU which does not need pilot input.
options.c: Restart the malfuctioning IDG by disconnecting and reconnecting it to the Split Bus Bar system.
options.d: Observe the additional engine parameters and get the appropriate checklist.
